gold: Hồi nãy, tôi mới nói xong. Mất thẻ, muốn làm lại, khi nào thì có?
predicted: Hồi nãy mới nói sợ mất thẻ muốn làm lại coi coi là khi nào thì có
werNormalizedGold: hồi nãy tôi mới nói xong mất thẻ muốn làm lại khi nào thì có

sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'tôi' (I) removes the subject of the sentence, which can make the meaning less clear, but in conversational Vietnamese, the subject is sometimes dropped without losing overall meaning.
Changing 'xong' (finished) to 'sợ' (afraid) significantly alters the meaning of the sentence, as it changes the context from having finished saying something to being afraid of losing the card.
Inserting 'coi' (look/check) adds a minor redundancy but does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
